sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115916" key="yuxopompei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῡχο-πομπεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n115916.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a place where departed souls are conjured up,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.560e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
